name: Jalapeno Chicken Fajitas
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the boneless chicken breasts with lime juice, water, and garlic.
2. Marinate for at least 15 minutes.
3. Preheat a grill or broiler.
4. Cook the marinated chicken over medium-high heat until thoroughly cooked and lightly browned, about 5-7 minutes per side.
5. Slice the chicken thinly against the grain.
6. Serve the sliced chicken in warm flour tortillas topped with lettuce, green onions, tomatoes, and ripe olives.
7. Makes 8 fajitas.
